title: Model Routing Table
description: Cost/success routing policy consumed by the BudgetController (SOLO-FOUNDER-AGENT-OPS-01 §7.3). selectModel(taskClass, agentRole) resolves a ModelSelection from `routes`; recordOutcome() and the escalation feedback loop append to `escalation_log`. Seeded empty in Phase 1 and populated from observed Dashboard 1 data in Phase 6 — never from assumptions.

schema_version.description: Semver of this table's structural schema.

success_rate_threshold.description: Global minimum task_success a candidate model must meet to be eligible (spec §7.2: 0.80). Null until populated.

generated_from.description: Provenance of the populated data, e.g. the Dashboard 1 query/run id. Null until populated.

populated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last population from observed data. Null until populated.

routes.description: One entry per observed task_class + agent_role combination. Empty until populated.

escalation_log.description: Append-only feedback loop: escalation events written back by the BudgetController (spec §7.4). Empty until escalations occur.

task_class.description: Task classification key looked up by selectModel(taskClass, ...).

agent_role.description: Agent role key looked up by selectModel(..., agentRole).

recommended_primary_model.description: Cheapest candidate meeting success_rate_threshold; the model selectModel returns first.

candidates.description: Candidate models for this route, conventionally ordered cheapest-first.

sample_size.description: Number of completed sessions backing these statistics (Phase 6 requires >= 10 per task_class).

p50_cost_usd.description: Median observed cost per session in USD.

p75_cost_usd.description: 75th-percentile observed cost per session in USD; cost-spike reference for escalation.

task_success.description: Observed task success rate for this model on this route.

escalation_tool_count_threshold.description: tool_count at which cost spikes above p75; escalate beyond this point.

cost_delta_usd.description: Difference between cheap-model P50 and escalated-model P50 (Langfuse swarm.escalation.cost_delta_usd).

escalation_count.description: Running total of escalations for this task_class.

recorded_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the escalation was recorded.
